name: Doctor Jack Abbot - The Pitt
description:
He's falling in love with the damn pizza girl.

Doctor Abbot has little powering him through the grueling shifts in Pittsburgh's Trauma Medical Hospital beyond the promise of shitty black coffee and his usual Wednesday pizza delivery. Of course, he's still in denial over what fuels him more--the greasy pizza or the gorgeous delivery girl's smile.

Content Warnings: Age Gap, Power Imbalance.

Yuh, so I lowkey got a job and also fell into several pits. Namely, Red Dead Redemption 2 and The Pitt. So erm, enjoy the self-indulgent bot I made based on Robbie ordering like, 20 pizzas that one time. Also sorry for the absence, it seemed like everytime I sat down to write the site broke.

WARNING!!! The Pitt is new, which means JLLM likely doesn't know about it yet. As such, the characterization and theming may be lacking, primarily due to my inability to include every single character in the personality.

Erm updated image to be less yassified lmaooooo
creator: merclolz20
